  1. PAY-4026
  2. PAY-4072

ach-returns: WFC AchInformation → MaxRedepositAttempts via accounts SB topic

Key details

Description

New Wellfit.ServiceBus consumer in AchReturns.API upserts [Returns].[ReturnConfigurations].MaxRedepositAttempts from WellfitConnect.AchInformation.Created's ECheckRetryAttempts field.

Single processor only (Worldpay_Card_Not_Present, no fan-out); null/out-of-range values log + skip silently (no upsert, no DLQ); CHECK BETWEEN 0 AND 2 enforced in the handler, not bubbled to SQL; standard upsert (insert if absent, update if present).

Includes a DDD refactor of ReturnConfiguration — private setters, parameterized ctor, UpdateMaxRedepositAttempts(int) domain method with range guard, replacing the public-setter anemic shape. Handler pattern mirrors RedepositAttemptedMessageHandler.

Routing (confirmed, no new infra): WFC's event already routes via the accounts EG Domain topic → accounts SB topic (staged in provision-sb-topics.sh commit 41f2da655, "accounts|submerchant-api|WellfitConnect.AchInformation.Created" — that line already serves PAY-4033's consumer). This item adds one more TOPOLOGY line for ach-returns-api on the same topic/event — no Terraform, no new topic.

Full analysis + solution: _bmad-output/products/payments/04_ExpresseLane/enhancement/wf-connect-ach-information-subscriber-ach-retry-config/

Acceptance Criteria

Wellfit SW Dev Workflow - Story/Bug UPDATED

Current status

In Stage

This work item can be moved to

BacklogReady for DevelopmentIn DevelopmentIn PreProd
or 4 other statuses
Backlog, Ready for Development, In Development, In PreProd, On Hold, WAITING REVIEW, Closed, and Ready Prod
Use direction keys to pan diagram. Use plus and minus keys to zoom the diagram.
  • Start - transition from here once created.
    • Create transition - move work item to Backlog. Has 1 rule.
  • Ready for QA status.
    • In QA transition - move work item from Ready for QA and PR Merged to In QA.
  • In QA status.
    • in stage transition - move work item from In QA to In Stage.
    • In Progress transition - move work item from In QA and Backlog to Ready for Development.
    • PR Approved transition - move work item from In QA, PR Created, and Ready for Stage to PR Merged.
    • Ready to Deploy transition - move work item from In QA to Ready for Stage.
  • Dev Verification status.
    • in qa transition - move work item from Dev Verification to In QA.
    • Dev Verification to stage transition - move work item from Dev Verification to In Stage.
    • Ready for QA transition - move work item from Dev Verification to Ready for QA.
  • Deferred status.
    • In Progress transition - move work item from Deferred and Ready for Development to In Development.
  • In Development status.
    • Transition from any status to In Development.
    • PR Created transition - move work item from In Development to PR Created.
    • Deferred transition - move work item from In Development to Deferred.
    • Reset to new transition - move work item from In Development to Backlog.
  • PR Created status.
    • In Progress transition - move work item from PR Created, On Hold, and In Stage to In Development.
    • PR Approved transition - move work item from PR Created, Ready for Stage, and In QA to PR Merged.
  • PR Merged status.
    • Deployed transition - move work item from PR Merged to In Stage.
    • Dev Verification transition - move work item from PR Merged to Dev Verification.
    • PR Created transition - move work item from PR Merged to PR Created.
    • In QA transition - move work item from PR Merged and Ready for QA to In QA.
  • Ready for Development status.
    • Transition from any status to Ready for Development.
    • In Progress transition - move work item from Ready for Development and Deferred to In Development.
  • Backlog status.
    • Transition from any status to Backlog.
    • Deferred transition - move work item from Backlog to Deferred.
    • In Progress transition - move work item from Backlog and In QA to Ready for Development.
  • Ready for Stage status.
    • PR Approved transition - move work item from Ready for Stage, PR Created, and In QA to PR Merged.
    • Deployed transition - move work item from Ready for Stage to In Stage.
  • Closed status.
    • Transition from any status to Closed. Has 2 rules.
    • Reopen transition - move work item from Closed to In Development. Has 1 rule.
  • WAITING REVIEW status.
    • Transition from any status to WAITING REVIEW.
  • On Hold status.
    • Transition from any status to On Hold. Has 1 rule.
    • In Progress transition - move work item from On Hold, PR Created, and In Stage to In Development.
  • In Stage status.
    • In PreProd transition - move work item from In Stage to In PreProd.
    • In Progress transition - move work item from In Stage, PR Created, and On Hold to In Development.
    • Deployed Prod transition - move work item from In Stage to Ready Prod. Has 1 rule.
  • In PreProd status.
    • Done transition - move work item from In PreProd to Ready Prod.
  • Ready Prod status.
